name: hh-assistant-infra
description: Pulumi (TypeScript) IaC for the ezra household assistant — see Pulumi.yaml.
comment: Isolated workspace: its own tsconfig + deps, deliberately OUTSIDE the app's strict tsconfig and the DBOS-determinism ESLint scope. TypeScript pinned to 5.9.3 (Pulumi's nodejs loader), NOT the app's 6.0.3. Exact pins honored via the repo-root .npmrc (save-exact).
